urgent_actions: Investigate and fix Competitor Spy, SEO Optimizer, and Video Reviewer agents

fix_instructions.Analytics: Check API connection and credentials in Analytics agent settings → ensure API key is valid and properly configured
fix_instructions.Revenue Tracker: Update Revenue Tracker agent with correct YouTube Partner Program (YPP) requirements and thresholds → review and adjust calculations
fix_instructions.Competitor Spy: Competitor Spy agent is missing COMPETITOR_API_KEY in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add it
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer: SEO Optimizer agent is skipping updates due to missing SEO_TEMPLATE_FILE → upload template file to agent settings
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer: Video Reviewer agent is not configured with VIDEO_REVIEW_CRITERIA → define and upload review criteria to agent settings
